name: Rolling Color Ball Game
description: Welcome to the world of color match games. Get ready for a thrilling and addictive arcade experience with color match! Guide your ball through a colorful 3D world filled with obstacles and surprises. Your only rule? Dont touch the wrong colors! Get ready to journey down an exhilarating track as a vibrant little ball, always pushing forward, always ready for the next big thrill. The gameplay is simple but hard to master. Just one simple rule, dont touch the other colors in the match game.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
